message:
e2e: Reduce test output noise, show server logs on failure

- Switch to dot reporter for minimal progress output
- Suppress server stdout/stderr during test runs
- Capture server output to log file
- Add custom reporter that prints server logs only when tests fail
- Use bun --silent to suppress script command echo

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/e7b82ee5-eb0b-42ed-bf13-efa9a3043179

files.patch:
@@ -4,3 +4,4 @@
 # Test results and reports
 test-results/
 playwright-report/
+.server-output.log
